args.notes: Kaiser HMO verified out of network for Owen Brooks. Call parent before any slot hold or scheduling workflow.
args.title: Discuss out-of-network benefits for Owen Brooks

args.body: Hi Rachel, thank you for sending Owen's referral. Our billing team needs to review the Kaiser plan because it appears to be out of network for Cedar Kids Therapy. A team member will follow up with options before we move forward with scheduling.

items.recommended_next_action: Billing should review out-of-network options with the parent before staff considers any appointment hold.
items.draft_reply: Hi Rachel, thank you for sending Owen's referral. Our billing team needs to review the Kaiser plan because it appears to be out of network for Cedar Kids Therapy. A team member will follow up with options before we move forward with scheduling.
items.decision_rationale: Referral has enough clinical intake data for OT, but insurance verification returned out_of_network and policy requires a benefits conversation before any slot hold or scheduling step.
